conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: ðə wɪnd ɪz maɪ ˈælaɪ | aɪ ɡoʊ wɛr ɪt teɪks mi
conversation.english: The wind is my ally. I go where it takes me.
conversation.chinese: 风是我的盟友，我随风而行。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: aɪ doʊnt nid saɪt tu si | ðə wɪnd kæn bi dɪˈsivɪŋ
conversation.english: I don't need sight to see. The wind can be deceiving.
conversation.chinese: 我不需要眼睛也能看见，风有时会迷惑人。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: hɑ | ðə blaɪnd mʌŋk | wɪl ju ʃoʊ mi jʊər weɪ
conversation.english: Ha! The blind monk. Will you show me your way?

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ˈoʊnli ðə waɪz ˈfɑːloʊ ðɛr oʊn pæθ | ðə ræʃ ˈpɛrɪʃ wɪð ðɛr sɔrd
conversation.english: Only the wise follow their own path. The rash perish with their sword.
conversation.chinese: 只有智者遵循自己的道路，鲁莽者终将被剑所毁。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: ðɛn lɛts si huːz pæθ ɪz kəʊld ˈwɪnər | meɪ ðə wɪnd dɪˈsaɪd
conversation.english: Then let's see whose path is stronger, winner. May the wind decide.
conversation.chinese: 那就让我们看看谁的道路更强吧，胜者由风决定。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ðɛn ðə ˈbætəl bɪˈɡɪnz | fil ðə fɔrs ʌv jʊər ˈɪnər tʃi
conversation.english: Then the battle begins. Feel the force of your inner chi.
conversation.chinese: 战斗开始吧，感受你体内的真气之力。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: aɪ hɪr jʊər ˈsaɪləns | ɪt spiks mɔr ðæn wɜrdz
conversation.english: I hear your silence. It speaks more than words.
conversation.chinese: 我听到了你的沉默，它胜过千言万语。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ˈsaɪləns ɪz ə ˈwɛpən | jus ðɪs ˈwaɪzli
conversation.english: Silence is a weapon. Use it wisely.
conversation.chinese: 沉默是一种武器，要明智地使用。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: ðə wɪnd bloʊz wʌns mɔr | ðɪs faɪt ɪz naɪ
conversation.english: The wind blows once more. This fight is nigh.
conversation.chinese: 风再次吹起，这场战斗即将开始。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ðɛn meɪ pis faɪnd ðə wɪnd wɛn ðə ˈbætəl ɪz ˈoʊvər
conversation.english: Then may peace find the wind when the battle is over.
conversation.chinese: 战斗结束后，愿和平随风而来。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: meɪ ðə wɪnd ˈkæri ʌs boʊθ | tu ˈdɛstəni
conversation.english: May the wind carry us both to destiny.
conversation.chinese: 愿风将我们引向各自的命运。
